title: verbena subpetiolata
intro: Verbena subpetiolata, also known as the dwarf verbena, is a flowering plant species belonging to the verbena family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Verbena subpetiolata include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep, and alleviate symptoms of digestive disorders such as diarrhea and nausea. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
